modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: 25Live Event Form fails to save due to missing Organization error.

full_description_text: 
The user is trying to save an event in the 25Live Event Form. An error message appears, stating that the Organization is missing, even though it has been filled out. This prevents the event from being saved successfully.
short_description: 25Live Event Form fails to save due to missing Organization error.
description: The user is trying to save an event in the 25Live Event Form. An error message appears, stating that the Organization is missing, even though it has been filled out. This prevents the event from being saved successfully.
